title: pityrogramma ebenea var. ebenea
intro: Pityrogramma ebenea var. ebenea, also known as Black Stag's Horn Fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pityrogramma ebenea var. ebenea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and also used in herbal remedies and supplements due to its potential medicinal properties.
